getState().returns: StateSnapshot  // see section-3--section-4 contract for full shape

getCurrentHintQuery().returns: { playerHandSnapshot: { cards, total, isSoft, isPair, canDouble, canSplit }, dealerUpcard: Card } | null  // null when phase != 'player_turn'
getCurrentHintQuery().notes: Convenience reader for hint-and-review. Returns the exact (playerHandSnapshot, dealerUpcard) tuple that strategy-table.recommendation() expects, derived from the active hand in the current state.

getDecisionLog().notes: Available in 'resolved'/'review' phase. One entry per decision the player made during the hand. correctAction is already populated by the state machine via strategy-table. hint-and-review walks this to render review rows.

notes: hint-and-review consumes decision data from the state machine. It does NOT compute correctness itself (state machine already did, against strategy-table). It does call strategy-table directly only for the proactive Hint button, using getCurrentHintQuery() as the input source.
